title: Colorful Outlines
description: Colorful Outlines for blocks and entity hitboxes
body:
# **Description**
Colorful Outlines makes it easy to see the edges of every block in Minecraft. You can also see outlines around entity hitboxes, so you always know exactly where things are. Works for all blocks and all entity types, making building, exploring, and fighting much easier!

# **How to Use**

1. Open your ```resourcepacks``` folder.

2. Place the pack in resourcepacks and turn it on in Minecraft.

The colored outlines will appear automatically on all blocks and entities.

## **Note**

Automatically colors outlines for blocks and entity hitboxes.

Should work fine with other resource packs that don’t change outline textures.

## Extra

### **Credit:**

- Made with help from a customization preview [website](https://enchanted.games/app/custom-outlines/) that made testing and designing easier.
- You’re free to use this resource pack anywhere (modpacks, videos, etc.).
- I’d be happy if you mention me and link to me, but it’s not required.

### **Contact:**

Join [my Discord server](https://discord.gg/UfwszAAEne) or email me if you want to talk or ask questions.

### **Made with ❤️ • FlamingShadow**
